title: Kris Radlinski
description: Great Britain and England international rugby league footballer, coach and administrator
extract:
Kristian John Radlinski MBE (born 9 April 1976) is an English rugby league executive who is CEO of the Wigan Warriors in the Super League and a former professional rugby league footballer. 
He played his entire professional career for Wigan, making over 300 appearances between 1993 and 2006, playing mainly as a fullback. He also won 10 caps for England and 20 caps for Great Britain at international level.
